description: One of the most influential American painters of the 19th century, Winslow Homer is known for his dynamic depictions of both upper-class leisure pursuits and nature's power and beauty. The paintings he created after 1882 focus almost exclusively on humankind’s contest with nature. Here, Homer depicted the heroic efforts of fishermen hauling in an abundant catch of herring while steadying their boat amid turbulent swells.
title: The Herring Net
